Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day[n]praying at the shrine...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like I'll receive[n]any further blessings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}お賽銭を入れようか…[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I put money into the box.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have enough money...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Wait, I've already prayed[n]at the shrine today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's getting late... I should[n]head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After making an offering and[n]praying, it feels like I've been[n]blessed with greater intelligence...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I offer 100 yen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I offer 1,000 yen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I offer 10,000 yen...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}So far, there's no sign of my prayer being[n]answered. Maybe I'll try again later...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The air around me has shifted...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's an unfamiliar scrap[n]of paper in my pocket...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Upon closer inspection... it looks[n]like an old bill. It says, "500 yen"...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like my prayers were answered.[n]I should let Elizabeth know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth[n]asked me to find a 500-yen bill[n]by visiting the shrine 100 times...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Well... Maybe I should pray before I go...[n]{f 1 1}
